mapper.select: SELECT project_id, project_code, project_name, client_id, client_id::text AS client_name, order_date, delivery_date, description FROM td_project WHERE project_id = #{projectId}

INSERT INTO td_project ( project_code, project_name, client_id, order_date, delivery_date, description, create_date, created_by, update_date, updated_by ) VALUES ( #{projectCode}, #{projectName}, #{clientId}, #{orderDate}, #{deliveryDate}, #{description}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{createdBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{updatedBy} ) RETURNING project_id

UPDATE td_project SET project_code = #{projectCode}, project_name = #{projectName}, client_id = #{clientId}, order_date = #{orderDate}, delivery_date = #{deliveryDate}, description = #{description}, update_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE project_id = #{projectId} RETURNING project_id
